Uses of Enum
org.bukkit.Instrument

Packages that use Instrument
Package
Description
org.bukkit
The root package of the Bukkit API, contains generalized API classes.
org.bukkit.block.data.type
Specific BlockData classes relevant to only a given block or set of blocks.
org.bukkit.entity
Interfaces for non-voxel objects that can exist in a world, including all players, monsters, projectiles, etc.
org.bukkit.event.block
Events relating to when a block is changed or interacts with the world.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    World.playNote(Location loc, Instrument instrument, Note note)
    Play a note at the provided Location in the World.
